arts.ttl: Salah rejects EIGHT clubs to sign new Liverpool deal
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah is set to complete a major U-turn and sign a new contract with Liverpool, rejecting eight other clubs that tried unsuccessfully to prise him away from Anfield. While Salah had been tipped to leave for the Saudi Pro League in the summer, it now appears that he will remain with the Reds for at least one more season – great news for Liverpool fans but bad news for everyone else.

arts.ttl: Liverpool injury, suspension list and return dates for Tottenham: Konate, Bradley updates
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of Liverpool's latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash with Tottenham Hotspur.

arts.ttl: 'Didn't touch the ball': Arne Slot says he thought one Liverpool player got 'bored' vs Southampton last night
Fulham trio to star against Saints - FPL tips & team of week
arts.sum: There's not one, but two triple-ups this gameweek as Thomas Woods goes all in on Chelsea and Fulham in his Fantasy Premier League team of the week.

arts.ttl: 'You cannot expect' - Arne Slot makes Federico Chiesa admission after Liverpool return
arts.sum: Federico Chiesa played 45 minutes of Liverpool's 2-1 Carabao Cup quarter-final win over Southampton

arts.ttl: Southampton 1-2 Liverpool: Player ratings as Reds survive Saints scare in Carabao Cup
arts.sum: Darwin Nunez took advantage of uncertainty in the Southampton backline to slot Liverpool in front after 24 minutes, with Harvey Elliott's effort doubling their lead eight minutes later following a slick move. Southampton pushed frantically for an equaliser and had some promising moments in the closing stages, with Jarell Quansah fortunate not to be sent off in second-half stoppage time as Liverpool narrowly held on to their lead.

arts.ttl: Botman, Udogie, Mazraoui: The early FPL Gameweek 17 team news
arts.sum: Before the press conferences, we round up the early team news The post Botman, Udogie, Mazraoui: The early FPL Gameweek 17 team news appeared first on Best FPL Tips, Advice, Team News, Picks, and Statistics from Fantasy Football Scout.

arts.ttl: Liverpool: Arne Slot makes admission over Southampton red card appeal in tight Carabao Cup win
arts.sum: Reds book spot in semi-finals with 2-1 victory over Saints

arts.ttl: Arne Slot happy as Liverpool see off Southampton to reach Carabao Cup semi-final
arts.sum: First-half goals from Darwin Nunez and Harvey Elliott put Slot’s side through.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot's message to Liverpool youngsters after Trey Nyoni debut
arts.sum: Arne Slot saw four youngsters feature as Liverpool defeated Southampton 2-1 in the Carabao Cup quarter-finals at St Mary's with some big names remaining on Merseyside
